banner.title: A royal ambience with a lavish spread of pure veg food.
banner.subtitle: Aaradhya Grand — specializing in delicious food featuring fresh ingredients and masterful preparation since 2017, on NH-75, Kolar.

philosophy.title: What makes Aaradhya Grand special.
philosophy.subtitle: Simple principles that guide everything we do — from the kitchen to your table.

items.title: Fresh Ingredients
items.description: Every dish is crafted with quality, fresh ingredients — no compromises. Masterful preparation that brings out authentic flavors.

items.title: Pure Vegetarian
items.description: A 100% vegetarian kitchen with vegan options — respecting vegetarian values without compromising on taste or variety.

items.title: Upscale Yet Casual
items.description: A lively, casual yet upscale atmosphere — perfect for families, business associates, friends, and solo diners alike.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: Unique dishes like vada curry dosa, paneer keema, and soya keema — things you rarely find anywhere else.

process.title: How a meal at Aaradhya Grand unfolds.
process.subtitle: From highway arrival to satisfied departure — every step designed for convenience and quality.

steps.title: Easy highway access
steps.description: Plenty of parking right off NH-75. Drive-through available for quick stops, or come in for the full experience.

steps.title: Dine your way
steps.description: Indoor or outdoor seating, table service or counter — plus a party hall for private events.

steps.title: Freshly prepared
steps.description: From dosas on the tawa to koftas from the kitchen — every dish prepared fresh with care.

steps.title: A place that makes you want to come back
steps.description: Quick service, warm staff, and consistent quality — see you on your next trip down NH-75.

team.title: The people behind Aaradhya Grand.
team.subtitle: A dedicated culinary team passionate about pure vegetarian food and exceptional hospitality.

members.name: Head Chef
members.bio: Specializing in South Indian breakfast, unique dosa varieties, and North Indian curries — bringing innovation to vegetarian cooking every day.

members.name: Service Manager
members.bio: Ensuring every guest — from solo travellers to large groups — gets quick, friendly, and seamless service.
